Product.Name: Notebook
Product.Description: Clean, minimal notebook for everyday notes, lists, and study sessions.

Product.Name: Pen Set
Product.Description: Set of five smooth-writing gel pens in soft assorted colors.

Product.Name: Sticker Pack
Product.Description: Decorative sticker pack for laptops, water bottles, and notebooks.

Product.Name: Mug
Product.Description: Simple ceramic mug for coffee, tea, or whatever gets you through the day.

Product.Name: Tote Bag
Product.Description: Reusable canvas tote bag for books, errands, and everyday essentials.

Product.Name: Hoodie
Product.Description: Soft everyday hoodie with a simple, comfortable fit.

Product.Name: Keychain
Product.Description: Compact keychain for keys, bags, or a little extra personality.

Product.Name: Bookmark
Product.Description: Magnetic bookmark that keeps your place without slipping out.

Product.Name: Desk Lamp
Product.Description: Compact desk lamp with adjustable brightness for reading or work.

Product.Name: Water Bottle
Product.Description: Durable reusable water bottle with a simple everyday design.

Product.Name: Highlighter Set
Product.Description: Pack of pastel highlighters for notes, planners, and textbooks.

Product.Name: Phone Stand
Product.Description: Simple foldable phone stand for desks, calls, and watching videos hands-free.
